chapters.title: One Piece
chapters.summary: 'Nerona Imu Descends' — Imu's true form and face are revealed for the first time as they arrive in Elbaf. The Five Elders try to prevent Imu from leaving the Holy Land, but Imu descends with overwhelming power, surrounding Aurust Castle with black flames. Next chapter 1180 expected April 19, 2026.

chapters.title: Nano Machine
chapters.summary: Weekly manhwa serialization continues. Latest release Chapter 308 on April 15, 2026.

chapters.title: Solo Leveling: Ragnarok
chapters.summary: Series on hiatus since January 2026 after illustrator JIN departed for mandatory military service. Expected to return around May–June 2026 with a new artist from Redice Studios.

chapters.title: Dandadan
chapters.summary: Chapter 232 released April 6, 2026. Next chapter expected May 4, 2026.

chapters.title: Blue Lock
chapters.summary: Barou uses Karasu's strategy to devour Shidou and scores for Japan, declaring himself the new king of Blue Lock. France's coach Rodin challenges Loki and Hugo, announcing a shift to a more aggressive strategy.

chapters.title: Sakamoto Days
chapters.summary: Weekly serialization in Shonen Jump continues. Chapter 255 released April 12, 2026. Next chapter 256 expected April 19, 2026.

chapters.title: Jujutsu Kaisen
chapters.summary: Series concluded with final chapter 'From Now On'. The sequel manga 'Jujutsu Kaisen Modulo' also reached its final chapter (Ch. 25) in March 2026.

chapters.title: Chainsaw Man
chapters.summary: Series concluded with Chapter 232, ending the Academy Saga (Part 2). Final Volume 24 releases June 4, 2026.

chapters.title: Tower of God
chapters.summary: Season 3 Finale. Main series on hiatus since February 2025. Spin-off 'Urek Mazino' ongoing with Chapter 59 as of April 2026.

chapters.title: Spy x Family
chapters.summary: Chapter 133 released April 12, 2026. Biweekly serialization in Shonen Jump+ continues.

chapters.title: Frieren: Beyond Journey's End
chapters.summary: On indefinite hiatus since October 2025 due to health concerns for creators Yamada and Abe. No confirmed return date.

chapters.title: Omniscient Reader's Viewpoint
chapters.summary: 'Dokja's Fable Part 9' — Chapter 307 released April 16, 2026. Weekly manhwa serialization continues.

chapters.title: Eleceed
chapters.summary: 'Awakened Academy' arc continues. Jiwoo's unique lightning-speed combat style is being pushed to its limit by refined techniques of international elites. Chapter 397 released April 14, 2026. Next chapter 398 expected April 21, 2026.

chapters.title: Return of the Blossoming Blade
chapters.summary: Ongoing manhwa serialization on WEBTOON (also known as Return of the Mount Hua Sect).

chapters.title: The Beginning After the End
chapters.summary: Ongoing webtoon adaptation continues. The light novel concluded in August 2025 at Chapter 529.

chapters.title: Kaiju No. 8
chapters.summary: Series completed with 129 chapters across 16 volumes. Anime 'Final Chapter' season by Production I.G is in production.

chapters.title: My Hero Academia
chapters.summary: Series concluded with Chapter 430 plus a bonus epilogue Chapter 431 in the final volume, showing the characters' futures years after the final battle.

chapters.title: Vinland Saga
chapters.summary: Series concluded with final chapter 'Somewhere Not Here', ending Thorfinn's journey after nearly 20 years of publication.

chapters.title: Kingdom
chapters.summary: 'Allies' Self-Sacrifice' — part of the Great War of Qin and Zhao Arc. Next chapter expected May 5, 2026.

chapters.title: One Punch Man
chapters.summary: Neo Heroes Uprising Arc continues. Chapter 228 released early April 2026.

chapters.title: WITCH WATCH
chapters.summary: Weekly serialization in Shonen Jump continues. Chapter 243 released April 12, 2026. Series has 25 volumes compiled.

chapters.title: Marriage Toxin
chapters.summary: Chapter 160 released April 15, 2026. Weekly serialization in Shonen Jump+ continues. Anime adaptation by Bones Film premiered April 7, 2026. Series has 17 tankōbon volumes with 1,000,000+ copies in circulation.
